creator: melifaro@FreeBSD.org
text:
I'm sorry that no one picked this PR in reasonable time.
The implementation for lagg/pf/ath has notable changed at least twice since 8.3.
I'm going to close this one, as it should work on the -CURRENT (expect pflog0, which disables it explicitly) and 8.3 is EOL.
Please do reopen if you encounter similar problems on the support FreeBSD version.
